task_objective: Resolve code review findings for index.tsx and test assertions by hardening date parsing validation and relaxing the test regex.
design_decisions: Refactored index.tsx to split selectedHistory.timestamp inside a block-scoped Immediately Invoked Function Expression (IIFE), safely handling missing/undefined properties and avoiding runtime TypeErrors.

Hardened formatDateMDY in index.tsx to strictly test for ISO YYYY-MM-DD pattern using regex (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/) before swapping string segments, returning the original date part if validation fails.

Updated test assertions in test_last_operation_date_display.py to use relaxed regexes that handle optional chaining (selectedHistory?.timestamp) so the test remains robust to styling/refactoring changes.

results.precommit_hooks: All hooks and build verification passed
